name: Best Ever Chocolate Pudding Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Spray an 8 x 8 inch square baking pan with cooking spray. In a medium bowl, cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Add the egg yolk and vanilla extract; beat at medium speed until combined. Gradually add flour and salt, stirring just until mixed. Press dough into prepared baking pan and chill.
When chilled, press dough onto the bottom and sides of the pan with floured fingertips, forming a 1/4-inch-thick layer. Fold up the edges about 1 inch over the rim. Chill again. For the filling, mix sugar and cornstarch in a small bowl until smooth. In an electric mixer, beat egg yolks on medium-high speed until light and fluffy. Gradually add the sugar-cornstarch mixture to the yolks; continue beating at medium-high speed until combined.
Add almond extract, cream, chocolate chips, and walnuts; mix gently until all ingredients are well incorporated. Pour filling over the chilled crust in the baking pan. Bake for 1 hour, or until the filling is set and golden brown. Turn off oven heat and let cool completely before cutting into bars.
